title: The Return of a Legend: Serum 2 is Finally Here, Plant-Powered Synthesis, and Massive End-of-Year Freebies
description: After eleven years of anticipation, Xfer Records has finally launched Serum 2, bringing a massive free update to the world’s most iconic wavetable synth. This week is all about pushing boundaries - from learning how to build massive breakbeats from scratch with IMAGINATE to exploring the surreal world of bio-data improvisation using plants and Moog Modular systems. It is also the final countdown for Universal Audio’s Holiday Sale (ending tomorrow, Dec 31!), but you can still stock your library for zero cost with Soundpaint’s "Free You" - a massive 800-sound collaborative project - and the charming new chiptune synth Chippo from Emily Hopkins.
author: BeatsPerDay

title: Cinematic Sub-Power, Mastering Secrets, and the $19 SSL Legend
description: Ready to upgrade your sound? This week, we explore the massive cinematic depth of Orchestral Tools’ Low End Orchestra alongside Soma’s new Warp hardware effects unit, while sharing expert tips on avoiding beginner mastering mistakes and preserving drum transients. It’s also the perfect time to expand your plugin folder for less: you can snag the iconic SSL Native Bus Compressor 2 for just $19, save a staggering 92% on the SSL Fusion bundle, and download Bloom Bass Groove Lite for free!
author: BeatsPerDay

title: Denon DJ Prime Go+ Arrives, Pro Vocal Mixing Secrets, & Huge Holiday Savings
description: This edition covers the arrival of the Denon DJ Prime Go+ and new spatial tools like the P930 Lunar Lander, offering fresh ways to expand your mobile and desktop setups. We also dive into the psychology of live sound mixing and highlight several significant end-of-year opportunities to upgrade your plugin suite.
author: BeatsPerDay

title: DAW Beta News, Pro Vocal Tutorials, & Up to 92% Off Audio Deals!
description: Hope you're having a creative week. We've just scanned the music tech landscape and have some exciting finds for you, including a brand new browser-based FL Studio Web Beta for easy collaboration and a great guide on using distortion to add depth to your tracks. Plus, don't miss out—there are some truly massive savings on plugins right now, with Antelope Audio and more seeing discounts up to 92%!
author: BeatsPerDay

title: Zebralette 3 is Here, Essential Mixing Tutorials, and BA-1 Synth at half price!
description: Hey there! We hope you're having a productive week in the studio. We've got a fantastic roundup of what's happening in the music world, including the official release of u-he's Zebralette 3—which is completely ready for you to explore. Plus, for anyone looking to refine their sound, we've spotted some great learning opportunities, like the concise video that debunks common mixing myths. Dive in for the latest essential updates and some deals that caught our eye.
author: BeatsPerDay

title: AI DJ Tools, Lush Shimmer Reverb, and Analog Warmth
description: This week, the world of music production gets a massive infusion of new technology and classic warmth. VirtualDJ 2026 enters early access with powerful AI enhancements like automatic lyric recognition and smart track organization, while Vexon Audio's PolyShimmer unveils a unique 4-layer design for creating deep, evolving sonic environments. We also explore new hardware from TipTop Audio and essential mixing tips for analog tone and signal saturation. Be sure to check out the Soundtoys Holiday Giveaway and grab fantastic deals on plugins from Native Instruments, Sonible, and Fuse Audio Labs!
author: BeatsPerDay

title: New Axe Machina Library, Compressor Masterclass & Half-Off AAS Plugins!
description: Hey there! As always, we've gathered the latest in music tech to keep your projects moving. This week, we've got some great news on the software front with Acon Digital's Extract:Dialogue 2 update for cleaner vocals and a fantastic Ableton Live tutorial for beginners that's a fresh take on creating a full track. We also made sure to include some deep savings for you, like a bunch of classic UAD plug-ins available for less than thirty bucks—definitely worth checking out!
author: BeatsPerDay

title: Generative MIDI Arrives, VR Mixing in Vision Pro, and Major Vocal Production Secrets
description: This week's roundup is filled with breakthroughs that will reshape your studio workflow. Ableton Live 12 has officially launched, bringing powerful generative MIDI tools to spark your creativity, while Neumann introduces an innovative app for Apple Vision Pro that allows you to literally interact with immersive audio in a 3D space. For tutorials, dive into an essential guide from producer Major Seven on achieving polished, pro-level vocals. Plus, don't miss out on the year's biggest savings, with Universal Audio launching its massive storewide sale and excellent free plugins available!
author: BeatsPerDay

title: Roland TR-8S for Acid, Recreating Vangelis & Soundtoys Black Friday Events
description: It’s great to be back in your inbox with some fresh inspiration, including a fascinating look at how the Boss SD-1 can add grit to your acid synthesis. We also found a helpful guide on Moog's approach to crafting musical patterns that we think you'll enjoy exploring this weekend.
author: BeatsPerDay

title: Serato's Crate Management, UAD's Massive Deals, & Pultec EQ Tutorials!
description: Hey there! We hope you're having a productive week in the studio. We've rounded up a killer selection of new music technology and essential tips for you today. This edition features exciting updates, including Serato's enhanced crate management in the new DJ 4.0 and the release of Kiff Audio's unique Zeit sample library. Plus, you can learn how to master the tricky low-end with some great mixing techniques!
author: BeatsPerDay

title: Vox Micro Amp Speaker, Essential Sound Design Guides, & Plugins Up to 60% Off!
description: It's a huge week for gear with Vox shrinking their classic stack into the cool new Micro Superbeetle Audio speaker and SYNTHR unveiling the massive 10-voice analog SYNTHR10! We've also gathered some essential sound design tutorials—including one on fixing muddy drums in 30 seconds—and highlighted sales on top plugins and sound libraries.
author: BeatsPerDay

title: EARLY BLACK FRIDAY, Arturia MiniLab 3 Controller & Vocal Layering Techniques!
description: Ready for a quick injection of production inspiration? This edition features a look at Native Instruments' new Scene: Willow cinematic instrument and a deep dive into vocal layering techniques, plus you'll definitely want to check out the early Black Friday offering significant savings on flagship software from Arturia and UVI.
author: BeatsPerDay

title: Gibson & Epiphone Guitars, Advanced Mixing Guides, & Up to 80% Off Gear
description: Ready for your dose of music tech inspiration? Today we've got some great news on the Gibson Noel Gallagher Les Paul and Universal Audio's Ocean Way Studios Deluxe plugin. Plus, be sure to check out the new vocal production guide and a special opportunity to save up to 80% on products from EastWest and others.
author: BeatsPerDay

title: New Analog Processors, Creative Reverbs & A Legendary Choir
description: Get ready to enhance your studio with a wave of major new releases, from essential analog hardware to groundbreaking software innovations. This week, SSL and Elektron deliver the final sonic polish for your mixes, Eventide redefines reverb with a musical 'modal' approach, and Spitfire Audio captures the distinctive power of a new world-class choir. Plus, we've rounded up a fresh batch of workflow tutorials and deep discounts to fuel your creativity.
author: BeatsPerDay

title: Footprint01 Gen2 News, Moog Synthesis Tutorials, & Komplete Savings
description: Today's update is packed with exciting developments in music production, from Barefoot Sound's comprehensive redesign of their high-end Footprint01 studio monitors to AudioThing's meticulous software emulation of the classic Roland Juno-60 analog polysynth. We also highlight must-see educational content, including Moog's seven-part video series to demystify synthesis for beginners, and incredible savings on major software suites like Native Instruments Komplete.
author: BeatsPerDay

title: Chro-Nyx and DOTS Modules, Deals Up to 85% Off, and Essential Sampling Tricks
description: I hope you've had a great week! Let's get right into the latest news, including Impact Soundworks' new synth, huge deals on plugins, and some great tutorials on sampling.
author: BeatsPerDay

title: Frozen Plain Dulcitone Plugin, Mastering Course, Waves OVox Tutorial, & More!
description: It's Tuesday again, and your dose of music software and hardware news is here! We've got the scoop on the new Artium Instruments The Doppler FM Synth and a handy tutorial on crafting classic vocoder effects with the Waves OVox plugin.
author: BeatsPerDay

title: New Spitfire Bassoons, a Synth Layering Guide, and Studio-Grade Plugins
description: Greetings, audio enthusiasts! We're celebrating the completion of Spitfire Audio's Symphonic Woodwinds with their new Abbey Road Orchestra: Bassoons library. Plus, we've got a comprehensive guide on layering synths to achieve a fuller, more expansive sound. As you wrap up, be sure to look for some essential audio software and plugins to enhance your collection.
author: BeatsPerDay

title: Nome II MIDI Clock, Pro Tools Stock Plugin Tutorial, and UDO Audio Ribbon Controller Demo!
description: This week's newsletter is filled with exciting updates, including Heavyocity's new Ostinato Textures sound library and the unique TapeFi Fail vintage cassette emulation plugin. We also have tutorials on Pro Tools stock plugins and melodic techno to help you enhance your production skills.
author: BeatsPerDay

title: Wunderkammer Sampler, Mastering Hip-Hop Vocals, and Waves Bonus Plugins
description: This week's roundup is packed with innovative gear and helpful advice for producers. Get the scoop on the new Zoom H6studio and its 32-bit float recording, plus dive into tutorials on everything from crafting the perfect techno rumble to mastering hip-hop vocals.
author: BeatsPerDay

title: JHS Pedals Recreates Classic Lo-Fi, Sinevibes Inertia v3 & more
description: Hey music makers! This week, we've got some serious gear to talk about. JHS Pedals has captured that classic Tascam lo-fi sound in a new pedal, Sinevibes has updated its versatile Inertia v3 envelope sequencer, and QuietFormat's new instrument, MELINO, brings vintage sounds to a modern interface. Plus, there are some great deals and free plugins to explore!
author: BeatsPerDay

title: Explore New Headphones, Vintage Guitar & Free EQ Match Plugin
description: We're kicking off with some new hardware, including Kali Audio's new HP-1 headphones and a stunning Epiphone Hummingbird Deluxe acoustic. For producers, there's a new hard techno sound pack for Sylenth1, and we're looking at some clever tutorials on crafting punchy drum mixes with UAD plugins. Let's get to it!
author: BeatsPerDay

title: Teenage Engineering Dolls, Ariel Posen Strat & Free EQ Match
description: Hello, music makers! This week, we're buzzing about Teenage Engineering's singing dolls in a Pixar film, Fender's stunning Ariel Posen signature Strat, and new Synthwave sounds for SynthMaster 3. Plus, don't miss Universal Audio's free LUNA DAW update with AI features! Let's dive in.
author: BeatsPerDay

title: UVI Falcon 3 Deal, Percussion Factory V2, & New Spitfire Library!
description: Explore the latest in music production with news on Voltage Modular's expanded offerings and the anticipated return of WMD's Metron Sequencer. Dive into updates for UVI Percussion Factory v2 and new sound design tools like Spitfire Audio's Tenebra.
author: BeatsPerDay

title: Prophet-5 Emulation, Linn LM-1 Drums, AI Vocal Prep  & Ableton Live 12 Deep Dive
description: This week's dispatch is packed with exciting new tools and insights to fuel your creative fire. We're talking about Acustica Audio's latest synth, rumored to be a killer Prophet-5 emulation, plus a new Eurorack module bringing classic Linn LM-1 drum sounds to your modular rig. And for all you Ableton users, we've got a comprehensive review of Live 12's new features, from its overhauled browser to innovative synths. Let's get to it!
author: BeatsPerDay

title: Waves AI Mastering, New Digital VCO for Eurorack, Free Ambient Reverb
description: Hope you're having a great week! Get ready to dive into the latest in music tech, as we've got the scoop on Busy Circuits' new MCO mk II and an awesome update for SynthMaster 3.3. Plus, don't forget to check out the amazing deals and free plugins we've rounded up just for you.
author: BeatsPerDay

title: New Moog Messenger, Clank Uranograph, Free Waves Plugins & DJ Tips
description: Superbooth may be over, but the innovations keep rolling in! This week we're checking out Moog's fresh Messenger monosynth, the intriguing Clank Uranograph blending acoustic and electronic worlds, and a generous free plugin pack from Waves. Plus, for all you DJs out there, we've got some essential tips on reading the dance floor. Let's dive into the latest sonic treats!
author: BeatsPerDay

title: Pulsar 23 Bass Drum Plugin, 50% Off ReValver Suite, and Vocal Production Masterclass
description: Sound explorers, this week is full of sonic treasures! Hunt Instruments just dropped an official Pulsar 23 Bass Drum Plugin that brings Vlad Kreimer's unique SOMA hardware into your DAW, ReValver Suite is slashing prices by 50% until April 13th, and multi-platinum producer Major Seven shares his vocal production secrets used with artists like Rihanna and Rick Ross.
author: BeatsPerDay
